faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the most authentic simulation experience, though rentals may be available upon request.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard simulation time for 18 holes is approximately 1-2 hours, but this can vary based on player pace and simulator settings.
